headline: Cigna Brings AI to Specialty Pharmacy With Pharmacy Forward
summary: Cigna's Evernorth launched AI-powered Pharmacy Forward to speed up specialty prescriptions, cut delays and boost efficiency with a $100M investment.

headline: Can Centene's Integrated Healthcare Model Support Earnings Growth?
summary: CNC's integrated healthcare model, AI-driven operations and improving Medicaid margins are strengthening earnings as the company raises 2026 EPS guidance.
